1001.BaseDetailsDes:
Basic Events for this pool include:
1. Every draw guarantees Shangri-La Frontier - Gold Meow Point rebates. The exact amount depends on the prize rarity: S Prize returns 50 Gold Meow Points, A Prize returns 30 Gold Meow Points, B Prize returns 20 Gold Meow Points, C Prize returns 15 Gold Meow Points, D Prize returns 10 Gold Meow Points, and E Prize returns 5 Gold Meow Points.
2. The 60th draw is guaranteed to be an S Prize Ticket!
1001.LuckDetailsDes:
Each draw in this pool has a 25.0000% chance to trigger a Lucky Event! Once triggered, you will randomly receive one of the following Luck effects based on their probabilities:
Next Draw Free: 20.0000%
Next Draw Returns 3x Bonus Points: 32.0000%
Next Draw S Prize Probability UP: 40.0000%
Next Draw Excludes C/D/E Prizes: 8.0000%
1001.PoolEnterIcon: Good thing Nimbus happened to be on the roof tonight. Looks like luck was on our side.

1002.BaseDetailsDes:
Basic Events for this pool include:
1. Every draw guarantees point rebates, with the amount dependent on the prize rarity: S Prize returns 50 points, A Prize returns 36 points, B Prize returns 24 points, C Prize returns 18 points, D Prize returns 10 points, E Prize returns 6 points.
2. The 30th draw is guaranteed to be an A Prize!
1002.LuckDetailsDes:
Every draw in this pool has a 25.0000% chance of triggering a Lucky Event! Once triggered, you will randomly receive one of the following Luck effects based on their probabilities:
Next Draw Free: 20.0000%
Next Draw Returns 3x Points: 32.0000%
Next Draw S Prize Probability UP (Weight Doubled): 40.0000%
Next Draw Excludes C/D/E Prizes: 8.0000%
